content.text:
<analysis>
a. Event type and context: This is a PULL_REQUEST event triggered by the PR being opened. The PR contains salvaged AIGR (AI Gene Review) work for P. putida Flic (flagellin protein).

b. Request type: This is clearly a code review request. The direct prompt asks me to review the pull request and provide feedback on code quality, bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. Key information:
   - PR adds 9 new files for P. putida fliC gene review
   - Files include: publications (3), gene review data (4), and InterPro/PANTHER family data (2)
   - The copilot reviewer has already identified 5 specific issues
   - Files are primarily YAML, markdown, TSV, and text format
   - This appears to be salvaged work from uncommitted agent work

d. Main tasks:
   - Read the repository's CLAUDE.md file for guidelines
   - Review all 9 added files for quality, consistency, and adherence to project standards
   - Check for bugs, security issues, performance problems
   - Validate YAML structure and content
   - Assess compliance with the project's gene review guidelines
   - Address the issues already identified by copilot reviewer

e. High-level plan:
   1. Read CLAUDE.md to understand project standards
   2. Review each file systematically
   3. Validate YAML files against schema if possible
   4. Check for consistency issues (like those flagged by copilot)
   5. Provide comprehensive feedback via GitHub comment
   6. No implementation changes needed - this is review only

f. Limitations: I should be able to complete this review fully. I have access to read files and validate content against the project guidelines.
</analysis>

input.body: ### Pull Request Review - P. putida Flic Gene Review I'll provide a comprehensive review of this salvaged AIGR review for P. putida fliC. **Todo List:** - [ ] Read project guidelines and schema - [ ] Review publication files for consistency and format - [ ] Review gene review files for compliance with standards - [ ] Check InterPro/PANTHER family data - [ ] Validate YAML structure and content - [ ] Address copilot reviewer feedback - [ ] Provide final recommendations Starting review... [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/23419535278)
